backend/main.mo: Actor implementing user auth checks, profile storage, chat message posting, and per-user data entry submission using Maps and Lists.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs to involved files, components, tests, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing prewritten summaries for various frontend components and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base setup defining theme variables, dark mode overrides, and global styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entrypoint setting metadata, SEO tags, structured data, and loading the main React bundle.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the landing page in ErrorBoundary and Suspense.
frontend/src/auth/localAuthCrypto.ts: Local authentication crypto utilities for generating salts, deriving password verifiers, verifying passwords, and importing keys.
frontend/src/auth/localAuthStore.ts: IndexedDB-backed storage for local auth accounts and sessions providing CRUD helpers.
frontend/src/components/auth/LocalAuthSc: Authentication screen handling sign‑in/sign‑up, password input, CAPTCHA validation, and error/state management.
frontend/src/components/auth/LocalCaptch: Simple math CAPTCHA component that generates challenges, verifies user input, and supports regeneration.
frontend/src/components/experience/Anony: Encrypted anonymous chat interface that decrypts messages, posts encrypted user input, and triggers therapist prompts based on mood classification.
frontend/src/components/experience/DataE: Form and list UI for submitting and viewing key‑value entries with loading and error handling.
frontend/src/components/experience/Exper: Layout wrapper providing consistent styled container for experience components.
Main experience screen that gates content behind authentication and displays chat and data entry panels.
frontend/src/components/experience/Thera: Modal prompting users to connect with a therapist when risk indicators are detected.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Footer displaying copyright text and a referral link with dynamic app identifier.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Butto: Custom button component supporting variants, sizes, and Radix Slot for flexible rendering.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Callo: Callout block rendering highlighted quoted content with accent styling.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Conve: Displays a sample user–AI message pair with optional motion effects, returning nothing if no preview is provided.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Glass: A styled div wrapper with hover and focus animations, implemented with forwardRef.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Progr: Renders a horizontal progress bar of steps with motion-aware animated widths.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Secti: A layout wrapper for page sections with optional eyebrow, title, and description headings.
frontend/src/components/sections/CoreEmo: A scroll‑animated section presenting a central emotional question and supporting text.
frontend/src/components/sections/Corpora: A scroll‑animated section explaining corporate burnout and the value of anonymity, including a callout stat.
frontend/src/components/sections/FAQSect: A scroll‑animated FAQ list using accordions for common questions about MindVault.
frontend/src/components/sections/Feature: Displays a grid of feature cards with icons and staggered entrance animations.
frontend/src/components/sections/FinalCT: A final call‑to‑action section with animated background and buttons to start or explore organizational options.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeroSec: The hero banner with animated gradient, particle overlay, headline, and primary actions.
frontend/src/components/sections/HowItWo: Describes the three‑step process with interactive step cards, progress indicator, and dynamic conversation preview.
frontend/src/components/sections/Privacy: Displays a privacy-focused section with animated reveal, listing trust points and a badge image.
frontend/src/components/system/ErrorBoun: Implements a React error boundary that shows a fallback UI with retry logic when errors occur.
frontend/src/components/visual/NeuralPar: Renders an animated canvas of moving particles and connecting lines unless reduced‑motion is preferred.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides context and logic for managing Internet Identity authentication and status.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalAuth.tsx: Implements a local auth system with signup, login, password validation, session handling, and encryption key derivation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and submitting messages and data entries through the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global Tailwind styles, color variables, typography, dark mode settings, and utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/classifier/moodBurnoutR: Implements keyword-based mood and burnout classification and generates preset supportive responses.
frontend/src/lib/crypto/e2ee.ts: Provides AES-GCM encryption/decryption and serialization helpers for end-to-end encrypted messages.
frontend/src/lib/motion.ts: Defines shared animation timing constants and a helper to build CSS transition strings.
frontend/src/lib/security/passwordPolicy: Validates password complexity, enforces rotation rules, and returns requirement text.
frontend/src/lib/useInView.ts: React hook using IntersectionObserver to detect when an element enters view, respecting reduced-motion settings.
frontend/src/lib/usePrefersReducedMotion: React hook that tracks the user's prefers-reduced-motion system setting.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider, then renders the root component.
Landing page that displays marketing sections and conditionally shows the ExperienceView.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters with sessionStorage fallback and hash support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending colors, animations, and plugins for custom theming.
project_state.json: Project state file describing overall architecture, features, requirements, and metadata.
